capabilities: Combine AI prompting and knowledge graph methodologies to create a unified knowledge base that leverages the strengths of both approaches.

procedure.action: Execute merge_artifacts using a graph database to combine nodes and edges from both knowledge bases using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Run SPARQL queries to validate_merged_output ensuring data integrity and consistency using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Execute machine learning algorithms to detect_candidates for new relationships or insights within the merged data by executing the transformation function on each input record; assert output_schema_valid = true and error_count < 1; log transformation_duration_ms.

Invoke a classification model to classify_results, categorizing new insights based on predefined ontologies by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Release a continuous integration pipeline to automate the validation and classification processes using blue-green deployment strategy; run smoke_test() against new instance before switching traffic; assert smoke_test_pass_rate >= 1.0 before promoting.

summary: Integrate AI prompting derived knowledge bases with knowledge graphs by merging artifacts, validating outputs, detecting candidates, and classifying results for enhanced insights.
title: AI Prompting and Knowledge Graphs Composition

failureConditions: Inconsistent data due to improper merging of artifacts.

Loss of insights if candidates are not correctly detected; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Misclassification of results leading to incorrect conclusions.
successConditions: Check that merged artifacts maintain referential integrity; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Ensure classification accuracy exceeds 90% using a validation dataset; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Verify that new insights are generated and logged within the system; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
